SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-26-2012 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-05-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:04am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Pamela Hawley appears in pro per. Respondent, Lisa Kim appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jungreis.

EXHA (1) packet of documents
EXHR (A) Folder titled Elevator Damage Documents
EXHA (2) Folder; first page is a Residential Tenancy Agreement
EXHA (B) Green folder of documents, first page is titled Paul d'Orleans Painting

10:41 matter is adjourned until property manager arrives to testify.
11:05am matter is re-called.

Bonnie Senteno is sworn in and called as a witness by the appellant.

11:23am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 10:37am
No appearance made by either party.
